name: alphaxiv-plugin
description: Bundle plugin that wires the hosted AlphaXiv MCP endpoint and ships a research-focused alphaxiv skill.

interface.shortDescription: Research search and paper analysis via AlphaXiv MCP.
interface.longDescription: Adds AlphaXiv-backed paper discovery, PDF question answering, and repository-reading workflows through the official AlphaXiv MCP service plus a companion skill.
defaultPrompt: Find recent papers on retrieval-augmented generation.
Summarize this arXiv paper and extract the main results.
Read the paper repo and explain how the implementation works.
